visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A cute, white, oval-shaped egg character with pink cheeks and a simple face stands on a light beige tiled floor. The background is a flat, warm pinkish-white color, suggesting an indoor domestic setting. The animation style is clean and 2D with soft lines and simple shading. (2) A large, tan-colored human fist slams down from the top of the frame, instantly crushing the egg character. Yellow liquid and shell fragments splatter across the tiled floor as the character disappears. The scene remains static in framing, emphasizing the sudden impact and comedic violence. (3) The camera cuts to two animated male characters; one is bald with a simple black tank top, looking worried, and the other is a man with a large green leaf wrapped around his head resembling a zongzi. They stand in a generic indoor space with flat lighting. (4) A flashback sequence is introduced by a bright flash of light. It shows the zongzi-headed character sitting in a chair with his chin resting on his hand, looking smug and feminine. The scene is bordered by a green, leaf-patterned frame to indicate a memory or imagination. (5) Back in the present, a simple wooden chair with two circular holes cut into the seat is presented in a medium shot. The bald character points at the chair while the zongzi-headed character looks on with a confused and sweating expression. (6) The zongzi-headed character sits on the special chair. A series of close-ups show his eyes widening in realization, then his face glowing. He transforms into a version with larger, sparkling eyes and a more detailed, realistic facial structure while looking directly at the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 端午節最重要的一件事情就是立蛋了. [Variety]: 蛋蛋. (2) [Subtitle]: 請端午小老師來示範一次立蛋. (3) [Subtitle]: 不能這樣浪費食物. (4) [Subtitle]: 你忘記立蛋是端午重要的習俗之一了嗎. (5) [Subtitle]: 如果能立的起來的話這一整年都能鴻運當頭啊. [Variety]: 蛋蛋. (6) [Subtitle]: 反正還不是被冷凍. (7) [Subtitle]: 請你繼續打. (8) [Subtitle]: 不可以放棄 阿啾. (9) [Subtitle]: 想想他去年是怎麼教我們立蛋的. (10) [Subtitle]: 我現在不就好好立著了嗎. (11) [Subtitle]: 你是立哪裡的蛋啦！！ (12) [Subtitle]: 下面的蛋！ (13) [Subtitle]: 所以只要讓他想起來他立的蛋. (14) [Subtitle]: 就會恢復原狀了嗎. (15) [Subtitle]: 來！端午小老師. (16) [Subtitle]: 請你坐在這個椅子上. (17) [Subtitle]: 這是什麼椅子啦！ (18) [Subtitle]: 為什麼上面會有兩個洞！ (19) [Subtitle]: 端午節立蛋專用椅. (20) [Subtitle]: 才沒有這種椅子！ (21) [Subtitle]: 什麼鬼. (22) [Subtitle]: 這個溫熱的觸感. (23) [Subtitle]: 這個完美的角度. (24) [Subtitle]: 這就是 端午立蛋...嗎. (25) [Subtitle]: ※並不是. (26) [Subtitle]: 變得更可怕了. [Variety]: 端午端午.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main animated men, 1 secondary man in a flashback, and 1 egg mascot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One bald man wearing a black tank top and one man with a green zongzi leaf wrapped around his head wearing a green shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Simple indoor settings with tiled floors and wooden furniture, along with stylized animation backgrounds featuring flashes and leaf patterns.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, cheerful acoustic guitar and piano BGM at a moderate tempo. A high-pitched, child-like female voice shouts "Dandan!" with high arousal and a rising pitch contour, accompanied by a clean room tone and studio-quality recording artifacts. (2) A sudden, loud percussive "slam" sound effect with a heavy low-frequency thud and a wide spectral bandwidth interrupts the music track. This is followed by a short silence and then the sound of liquid splashing, characterized by short, messy high-frequency transients. (3) Three distinct male voices enter with a high speech rate and significant pitch variability. Their tones are varied, ranging from aggressive and authoritative to confused and anxious. The background music remains active but ducked slightly beneath the loud, clear vocal tracks for clarity. (4) A melodic, slower orchestral theme begins during a perceived shift in scene or narrative context. A male voice speaks with lower pitch and a confident, smug tone. This is accompanied by stylized "ting" sound effects and a subtle increase in reverb. (5) The audio features a series of rapid "whoosh" and "ping" sound effects, indicating fast transitions between character reactions. A male voice shouts with high intensity and vocal strain. The BGM tempo feels consistent, maintaining a comedic and energetic atmosphere throughout the sequence. (6) A shimmering, magical synth sound effect swells in volume as a male voice delivers a realization in a breathy, awe-struck tone. The video concludes with a rhythmic, repetitive vocal chant "Duanwu Duanwu" over a fading comedic musical stinger and final digital pop effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Setup -> Conflict -> Absurd Solution -> Transformation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a humorous animated short based on the Dragon Boat Festival tradition of egg standing, using absurd comedy and visual gags to entertain viewers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses exaggerated animation tropes and high-energy voice acting to deliver a comedic punchline centered on a cultural festival tradition.
